subject: refactor(ui): extract shared components, hooks, and constants
body:
- Extract EmptyState component (src/components/ui/EmptyState.tsx) from
  3 duplicate empty state patterns in FormListPage, ResponsesPage, and
  BuilderCanvas
- Extract useScrollLock hook into scrollLock.ts, replacing identical
  useEffect blocks in ConfirmDialog and BottomSheet with one-line call
- Extract BuilderBanners component from BuilderPage (716 → 668 lines),
  encapsulating save/publish/import/share banners
- Add BTN_PRIMARY and BTN_SECONDARY constants to lib/constants.ts,
  replacing 5 duplicate button class strings across NotFoundPage,
  FormListPage, ResponsesPage, and ErrorBoundary
- Extract duplicate chevron SVG to local constant in FormListPage
- Remove unnecessary exports on INPUT_BASE, INPUT_NORMAL, INPUT_ERROR
  in types.ts — only inputClassName() is imported externally

Tags: refactor, cleanup, duplication, components

Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
